name: Real Estate — Onboarding phase
description: Residential rental onboarding. Motivations should center on settling in, neighbourhood familiarity, building trust with the operator.

input.businessDescription: Operator of premium long-stay residential buildings. Tenants stay 6 months to 3 years and rely on a resident app + concierge service for everything from maintenance to community events.
input.painPoints: First 30 days have the most maintenance tickets and the highest churn risk. Tenants don't know who handles what (super vs concierge vs landlord).

journeyPhase.label: Onboarding
journeyPhase.description: Tenant has signed the lease and is moving in. First 30 days — settling, learning the building, building confidence in the operator.
